# commands

```go
import "github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/pkg/commands"
```

Package commands wires Cobra commands and delegates command workflows to internal modules.

Package commands provides the CLI commands for fotingo.

This file defines JSON output structures for all commands to support machine\-readable output via the \-\-json flag.

## Variables

<a name="Version"></a>Build metadata injected at release time via ldflags.

```go
var (
    Version   = "dev"
    GitCommit = "unknown"
    BuildTime = "unknown"
    Platform  = "unknown/unknown"
)
```

<a name="Fotingo"></a>

```go
var Fotingo = &cobra.Command{
    Use:           "fotingo",
    Short:         i18n.T(i18n.RootShort),
    Long:          i18n.T(i18n.RootLong),
    SilenceUsage:  true,
    SilenceErrors: true,
}
```

<a name="Global"></a>Global holds the current global flags

```go
var Global = GlobalFlags{}
```

<a name="Execute"></a>
## func [Execute](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/root.go#L68>)

```go
func Execute()
```

Execute runs the root command and handles exit codes. This is the main entry point for the CLI and should be called from main\(\).

<a name="ExecuteWithExitCode"></a>
## func [ExecuteWithExitCode](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/root.go#L77>)

```go
func ExecuteWithExitCode() (exitCode int)
```

ExecuteWithExitCode runs the root command and returns the exit code. This is useful for testing where os.Exit should not be called.

<a name="IsShellCompletionRequest"></a>
## func [IsShellCompletionRequest](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/completion_mode.go#L41>)

```go
func IsShellCompletionRequest() bool
```



<a name="OutputJSON"></a>
## func [OutputJSON](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L216>)

```go
func OutputJSON(data interface{})
```

OutputJSON outputs the data as formatted JSON to stdout. This is a convenience function that creates a new JSONOutput and writes.

<a name="OutputJSONError"></a>
## func [OutputJSONError](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L225>)

```go
func OutputJSONError(err error)
```

OutputJSONError outputs an error as JSON to stdout.

<a name="ShouldOutputDebug"></a>
## func [ShouldOutputDebug](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L257>)

```go
func ShouldOutputDebug() bool
```

ShouldOutputDebug returns true when diagnostic output should be shown.

<a name="ShouldOutputJSON"></a>
## func [ShouldOutputJSON](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L237>)

```go
func ShouldOutputJSON() bool
```

ShouldOutputJSON returns true if the \-\-json flag is set. Commands should check this before outputting human\-readable text.

<a name="ShouldOutputVerbose"></a>
## func [ShouldOutputVerbose](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L249>)

```go
func ShouldOutputVerbose() bool
```

ShouldOutputVerbose returns true when step\-level progress should be shown.

<a name="ShouldSuppressOutput"></a>
## func [ShouldSuppressOutput](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L244>)

```go
func ShouldSuppressOutput() bool
```

ShouldSuppressOutput returns true if output should be suppressed. This is true when \-\-quiet is set or when \-\-json is set \(to avoid mixing human\-readable output with JSON\).

<a name="AISetupOutput"></a>
## type [AISetupOutput](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L146-L154>)

AISetupOutput represents JSON output for \`fotingo ai setup\`.

```go
type AISetupOutput struct {
    Success   bool            `json:"success"`
    Scope     string          `json:"scope,omitempty"`
    Providers []string        `json:"providers,omitempty"`
    DryRun    bool            `json:"dryRun,omitempty"`
    Force     bool            `json:"force,omitempty"`
    Results   []AISetupResult `json:"results,omitempty"`
    Error     string          `json:"error,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="AISetupResult"></a>
## type [AISetupResult](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L157-L164>)

AISetupResult captures one provider install outcome.

```go
type AISetupResult struct {
    Provider string `json:"provider"`
    Scope    string `json:"scope"`
    Root     string `json:"root"`
    Path     string `json:"path"`
    Status   string `json:"status"`
    Reason   string `json:"reason,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="BranchInfo"></a>
## type [BranchInfo](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/inspect.go#L39-L43>)

BranchInfo contains information about a git branch

```go
type BranchInfo struct {
    Name          string `json:"name"`
    IssueID       string `json:"issueId,omitempty"`
    DefaultBranch string `json:"defaultBranch,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="CommitInfo"></a>
## type [CommitInfo](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/inspect.go#L58-L62>)

CommitInfo contains information about a git commit

```go
type CommitInfo struct {
    Hash    string `json:"hash"`
    Message string `json:"message"`
    Author  string `json:"author"`
}
```

<a name="ErrorOutput"></a>
## type [ErrorOutput](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L175-L179>)

ErrorOutput represents a JSON error response.

Example:

```
{
  "error": "failed to create branch",
  "code": 4,
  "type": "Git error"
}
```

```go
type ErrorOutput struct {
    Error string `json:"error"`
    Code  int    `json:"code,omitempty"`
    Type  string `json:"type,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="GlobalFlags"></a>
## type [GlobalFlags](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/root.go#L19-L27>)

GlobalFlags holds the global flags available to all commands

```go
type GlobalFlags struct {
    Branch  string
    Yes     bool
    JSON    bool
    Quiet   bool
    Verbose bool
    Debug   bool
    NoColor bool
}
```

<a name="InspectOutput"></a>
## type [InspectOutput](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/inspect.go#L31-L36>)

InspectOutput represents the JSON output of the inspect command

```go
type InspectOutput struct {
    Branch   *BranchInfo  `json:"branch,omitempty"`
    Issue    *IssueInfo   `json:"issue,omitempty"`
    IssueIDs []string     `json:"issueIds,omitempty"`
    Commits  []CommitInfo `json:"commits,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="IssueInfo"></a>
## type [IssueInfo](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/inspect.go#L46-L55>)

IssueInfo contains information about a Jira issue

```go
type IssueInfo struct {
    Key         string `json:"key"`
    Summary     string `json:"summary"`
    Description string `json:"description,omitempty"`
    Status      string `json:"status"`
    Type        string `json:"type"`
    ParentKey   string `json:"parentKey,omitempty"`
    EpicKey     string `json:"epicKey,omitempty"`
    URL         string `json:"url"`
}
```

<a name="OpenOutput"></a>
## type [OpenOutput](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L137-L143>)

OpenOutput represents the JSON output of the open command.

Example success output:

```
{
  "success": true,
  "target": "pr",
  "url": "https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/42",
  "opened": true
}
```

```go
type OpenOutput struct {
    Success bool   `json:"success"`
    Target  string `json:"target"`
    URL     string `json:"url,omitempty"`
    Opened  bool   `json:"opened,omitempty"`
    Error   string `json:"error,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="PullRequestInfo"></a>
## type [PullRequestInfo](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L119-L125>)

PullRequestInfo contains information about a GitHub pull request.

```go
type PullRequestInfo struct {
    Number int    `json:"number"`
    URL    string `json:"url"`
    Title  string `json:"title"`
    Draft  bool   `json:"draft"`
    State  string `json:"state"`
}
```

<a name="ReviewOutput"></a>
## type [ReviewOutput](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L106-L116>)

ReviewOutput represents the JSON output of the review command.

Example success output:

```
{
  "success": true,
  "pullRequest": {
    "number": 42,
    "url": "https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/42",
    "title": "[PROJ-123] Fix login bug",
    "draft": false,
    "state": "open"
  },
  "issue": {
    "key": "PROJ-123",
    "summary": "Fix login bug",
    "status": "In Review",
    "type": "Bug",
    "url": "https://jira.example.com/browse/PROJ-123"
  },
  "labels": ["bug", "priority"],
  "reviewers": ["alice", "bob"],
  "teamReviewers": ["acme/platform"],
  "assignees": ["alice"]
}
```

Example when PR already exists:

```
{
  "success": true,
  "pullRequest": {
    "number": 42,
    "url": "https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/42",
    "title": "[PROJ-123] Fix login bug",
    "draft": false,
    "state": "open"
  },
  "existed": true
}
```

```go
type ReviewOutput struct {
    Success       bool             `json:"success"`
    PullRequest   *PullRequestInfo `json:"pullRequest,omitempty"`
    Issue         *IssueInfo       `json:"issue,omitempty"`
    Labels        []string         `json:"labels,omitempty"`
    Reviewers     []string         `json:"reviewers,omitempty"`
    TeamReviewers []string         `json:"teamReviewers,omitempty"`
    Assignees     []string         `json:"assignees,omitempty"`
    Existed       bool             `json:"existed,omitempty"`
    Error         string           `json:"error,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="StartBranchInfo"></a>
## type [StartBranchInfo](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L62-L65>)

StartBranchInfo contains branch information for the start command output.

```go
type StartBranchInfo struct {
    Name    string `json:"name"`
    Created bool   `json:"created"`
}
```

<a name="StartOutput"></a>
## type [StartOutput](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/pkg/commands/output.go#L54-L59>)

StartOutput represents the JSON output of the start command.

Example success output:

```
{
  "success": true,
  "issue": {
    "key": "PROJ-123",
    "summary": "Fix login bug",
    "status": "In Progress",
    "type": "Bug",
    "url": "https://jira.example.com/browse/PROJ-123"
  },
  "branch": {
    "name": "feature/PROJ-123-fix-login-bug",
    "created": true
  }
}
```

Example error output:

```
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "failed to initialize Jira client: authentication required"
}
```

```go
type StartOutput struct {
    Success bool             `json:"success"`
    Issue   *IssueInfo       `json:"issue,omitempty"`
    Branch  *StartBranchInfo `json:"branch,omitempty"`
    Error   string           `json:"error,omitempty"`
}
```
